nodes.name: PR_LABELING.md
nodes.summary: Agent guide for applying PR labels in RisingWave, covering required sources of truth, label operation sequence, CI coverage labels, and test-area labels across 9 sections.

nodes.name: openai.yaml
nodes.summary: OpenAI agent interface configuration for the fix-buildkite-ci skill, specifying model and interface parameters.

nodes.name: buildkite-ci-triage.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for triaging Buildkite CI failures, with 9 sections covering prerequisites, fetching build JSON, listing failed jobs, fetching logs, inspecting artifacts, common pitfalls, and exit code hints.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the fix-buildkite-ci agent, outlining a 6-step workflow: identify failing checks, pull build JSON, extract failures, fall back to artifacts, apply fixes, and verify.

nodes.name: openai.yaml
nodes.summary: OpenAI agent interface configuration for the risingwave-rust-analyzer skill, specifying model and interface parameters.

nodes.name: rust-analyzer-cli.md
nodes.summary: Reference documentation for using the rust-analyzer CLI with RisingWave, covering commands, RisingWave defaults, feature flag strategies, and a verification pattern.

nodes.name: list-crate-features.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that inspects and lists Rust crate feature flags for RisingWave, supporting package filtering, feature flag printing, and summary reporting for rust-analyzer configuration.

nodes.name: usage
nodes.summary: Prints usage/help text for the list-crate-features.sh script.

nodes.name: emit_package_list
nodes.summary: Outputs a list of all packages in the workspace matching the current filter criteria.

nodes.name: matched_packages_json
nodes.summary: Returns JSON representation of matched packages from the workspace metadata, used for feature flag inspection.

nodes.name: print_feature_lines
nodes.summary: Iterates over matched packages and prints their feature flag definitions in a readable format.

nodes.name: build_cargo_command
nodes.summary: Constructs the cargo command string to be used when querying feature flags for a given crate.

nodes.name: build_override_command
nodes.summary: Builds the rust-analyzer override command needed to activate specific features for a crate.

nodes.name: print_package_summary
nodes.summary: Prints a human-readable summary of all matched packages along with their available features.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the RisingWave rust-analyzer agent, with a 4-step workflow covering analysis root confirmation, crate/feature resolution, CLI usage, and LSP configuration.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for SLT test authoring in RisingWave, covering grounding sources, authoring workflow, system ok substitution rules, SLT syntax, query assertion rules, and validation checklist.

nodes.name: audit.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo audit configuration specifying ignored security advisory IDs and audit policy for the RisingWave workspace.

nodes.name: config.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo workspace configuration specifying platform-specific linker settings (mold on Linux, lld on macOS), rustflags, build target, and unstable git features.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses platform-cfg targets to set different linkers per OS and architecture, enabling faster incremental builds.

nodes.name: hakari.toml
nodes.summary: Hakari workspace hack configuration for RisingWave, specifying traversal exclusions to manage unified feature resolution across the Cargo workspace.

nodes.name: nextest.toml
nodes.summary: Nextest test runner configuration defining default, ci, and ci-sim profiles with test timeouts, thread counts, JUnit output, and test group overrides.

nodes.name: config.yaml
nodes.summary: Gemini AI assistant configuration for the RisingWave project, specifying code review settings and behavior.

nodes.name: .git-blame-ignore-revs
nodes.summary: Git blame ignore revisions file listing bulk formatting/refactoring commits that should be skipped in git blame output.

nodes.name: .gitattributes
nodes.summary: Git attributes file configuring language detection and diff settings for the RisingWave repository.

nodes.name: store.db
nodes.summary: SQLite database file storing project memory/context for AI assistant tools working with the RisingWave codebase.

nodes.name: store.db-wal
nodes.summary: SQLite write-ahead log for the project memory store, containing pending transactions not yet checkpointed to store.db.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore file for the understand-anything tool, listing file patterns and paths to exclude from project analysis.

nodes.name: 01-users.ldif
nodes.summary: LDAP Data Interchange Format file defining test user entries for LDAP authentication E2E tests in RisingWave CI.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide (16 sections) for LDAP authentication E2E tests, covering directory structure, test users, certificate generation, test execution, RisingWave TLS configuration, and local development setup.

nodes.name: setup-ldap-certs.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that generates TLS certificates and keys for the LDAP test server, setting up the CA, server certificate, and client certificates for secure LDAP CI tests.

nodes.name: config-replica.js
nodes.summary: MongoDB replica set initialization script that configures a single-node replica set for CI integration testing.

nodes.name: post-command
nodes.summary: Buildkite plugin post-command hook that collects and uploads docker-compose service logs after a CI build step completes.

nodes.name: pre-command
nodes.summary: Buildkite plugin pre-command hook that creates a swap file on the CI agent to prevent OOM failures during large builds.
